generated_oml:

]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations modeling dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance CyberModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Cyber models for control logic implementation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler

]

]

    DTDFVocab:provides ForecastingInsight
]

    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

]

]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization through algorithmic processing of sensor data and models"
]

instance ForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs calibration algorithms to update Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environmental models with parameter estimates derived from sensor data, which informs monitoring systems for safety and optimization checks; detected violations prompt human or algorithmic adjustments to the Physical Twin."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle integrates design-phase Computer-Aided Design (CAD) models for geometric specifications and analysis-phase dynamic models using differential equations for physical behavior simulation. Upon system deployment, these models are maintained and integrated into the Digital Twin framework to support ongoing monitoring, simulation, and optimization of the Physical Twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update model parameters using real-time sensor data to maintain fidelity with the Physical Twin. Monitoring systems validate system performance against safety and optimality criteria, with detected violations prompting corrective actions through human or algorithmic interventions."
]
